things.name: Liseberg Amusement Park
things.description: Scandinavia's largest amusement park with 40 rides and Sweden's tallest roller coaster

things.name: Gothenburg Museum of Art
things.description: Northern Europe's finest art museum outside of capital cities with Rembrandt and Monet

things.name: Universeum
things.description: Science centre with rainforest, ocean, space and a living reef aquarium

things.name: Haga District
things.description: Charming 19th-century cobblestone neighbourhood with wooden houses, cafes and the giant cinnamon roll

things.name: Gothenburg Opera
things.description: World-class opera house on the waterfront with spectacular harbour views

things.name: Slottsskogen Park
things.description: 137-hectare city park with a free zoo, ponds and Gothenburg's favourite outdoor gathering spot

things.name: Maritime Museum & Aquarium
things.description: Maritime heritage of Gothenburg with historic vessels in the harbour

things.name: Rohsska Museum
things.description: Nordic countries' only dedicated design and craft museum

things.name: Avenyn
things.description: Gothenburg's main boulevard lined with restaurants, bars and the Poseidon fountain

things.name: Swedish West Coast Seafood
things.description: Best seafood in Sweden - prawns, lobster and oysters fresh from the Gothenburg archipelago
